summary: Lending & Borrowing Feature Testing Complete - All backend APIs working, UI verified. Fixed datetime bug in lending.py. Full flow tested: Child creates loan request -> Parent sees request -> Parent responds (Accept/Reject/Counter) -> Child sees updated status.

bugs_fixed.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bugs_fixed.fix: Added handling for date-only format (YYYY-MM-DD) in addition to datetime format when calculating days_until_due

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/lending/eligibility - Child grade 4 is eligible
✅ GET /api/lending/limits - Returns correct limits (parent: 2000, classmate: 500)
✅ GET /api/lending/credit-score - Returns default score 70 for new users
✅ GET /api/lending/parents - Child can get parent list for loan requests
✅ POST /api/lending/request - Child can create loan request to parent
✅ GET /api/lending/requests/sent - Child can see sent requests
✅ GET /api/lending/requests/received - Parent can see received requests with borrower credit score
✅ POST /api/lending/requests/{id}/respond (action=reject) - Parent can reject loan
✅ POST /api/lending/requests/{id}/respond (action=counter) - Parent can make counter offer
✅ POST /api/lending/requests/{id}/respond (action=accept) - Parent can accept loan and money transfers
✅ GET /api/lending/loans/borrowing - Child can see borrowed loans with days_until_due
✅ GET /api/lending/loans/lending - Parent can see lent loans
✅ GET /api/lending/summary - Returns credit score and borrowing/lending stats
✅ GET /api/lending/parent/child-loans/{child_id} - Parent can view child's loan activity
✅ Parent Dashboard - Lending Center section displays loan requests from children
✅ Parent Dashboard - Accept Loan Request dialog opens with correct details
✅ Parent Dashboard - Dialog shows borrower info, amount, interest, total return, purpose, return date
✅ Parent Dashboard - Send Money and Cancel buttons present in dialog
✅ Child Lending Page - Shows Credit Score (70 Good)
✅ Child Lending Page - Shows summary cards (Borrowed, Lent Out, Pending, Debt Limit)
✅ Child Lending Page - Shows Pending Requests with counter offer status
✅ Child Lending Page - Shows Active Loans with days left and Repay Now button
✅ Child Lending Page - Request a Loan button present
critical_code_review_comments: Lending feature is well implemented with proper grade-based access control (grades 4-5 only)
Credit score calculation is comprehensive with on-time payments, late payments, and defaults
Money transfer on loan acceptance is atomic and correct
Counter offer flow is properly implemented with notification system
Parent Dashboard Lending Center UI is clean and functional
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/lending.py - Fixed datetime comparison bug for date-only return_date format
seed_data_creation: Created test parent and child users with wallets and sessions for lending feature testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lending feature is fully functional. Test users created: test_lending_parent_001 and test_lending_child_001 (grade 4). All lending APIs work correctly. The datetime bug in lending.py was fixed - return_date can be stored as date-only (YYYY-MM-DD) or full datetime format. Parent Dashboard shows Lending Center section with loan requests from children. Child Lending Page shows credit score, summary, pending requests, and active loans.
